faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about Anime AI Studio

items.question: Who is Anime AI Studio for?
items.answer: Our product is designed for: 1) Short video content creators on platforms like TikTok, YouTube Shorts, and Instagram Reels; 2) MCN agencies/drama studios needing batch, standardized short drama production; 3) Social media operators wanting to try drama format without professional filmmaking experience; 4) AI video enthusiasts interested in AIGC video creation; 5) Beginner screenwriters/directors with creative ideas but lacking industry experience. Core user profile: Creators with ideas who don't know professional video production workflows.

items.question: What pain points does it solve?
items.answer: Core pain points: High barrier to anime drama production, fragmented workflow, low efficiency. 1) High professional barrier - Requires scriptwriting, storyboarding, art, directing skills. We provide AI-guided full workflow so beginners can create professional storyboards; 2) Fragmented tools - No need to switch between Word, Excel, Midjourney, Runway. One-stop platform with 5 seamlessly connected stages; 3) Low efficiency - A 10-episode drama might take 2-4 weeks, AI assistance can compress it to 1-3 days; 4) High costs - Individual creators can complete the entire workflow independently.

items.question: What are the core features?
items.answer: 5 core stages implemented: 1) Screenwriter - 4-step script creation: concept formation → full drama design → batch script generation → AI delivery; 2) Storyboard Artist - Script to professional storyboard conversion with 10-field standard format; 3) Image Designer - Auto-extract character/scene reference image prompts; 4) Artist - Batch AI model calls to generate reference images and keyframes; 5) Director - Keyframe to AI video generation. Plus 8 anime genre templates and all content displayed on infinite canvas.

items.question: What are typical use cases?
items.answer: 1) Monetization - I have a revenge drama story idea and want to quickly make it into a short drama; 2) Batch production - MCN agencies need to produce multiple 5-10 episode vertical dramas weekly; 3) Learning - Beginners wanting to understand the full short drama production workflow; 4) Prototype validation - Quickly generate script and visual demos with AI to validate if an idea is viable; 5) Assisted creation - Professional teams use AI to accelerate pre-production planning and storyboard design.

items.question: How do I get started?
items.answer: Typical workflow: User inputs a one-sentence idea → AI generates complete script → Auto-breakdown into storyboards → Batch generate keyframe images → One-click AI short video generation. Simply click the 'Start Creating' button above and input your creative idea to begin.

items.question: What makes this product innovative?
items.answer: The world's first one-stop Anime AI Studio based on infinite canvas. We're not a general AI tool, but a vertical solution deeply optimized for the entire short drama production workflow. The infinite canvas design lets your story grow in all directions, breaking traditional page limitations for true creative freedom.
